scripts.text:
-- INSERT when START
INSERT INTO etl_run_tracking (
    pipeline_name,
    dataset_name,
    load_type,
    start_time,
    status
)
SELECT
    '@{pipeline().parameters.p_pipeline_name}',
    '@{pipeline().parameters.p_dataset_name}',
    '@{pipeline().parameters.p_load_type}',
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    'STARTED'
WHERE '@{pipeline().parameters.p_status}' = 'START';


-- UPDATE when SUCCESS or FAILED
UPDATE etl_run_tracking
SET
    end_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    status = '@{pipeline().parameters.p_status}',
    records_processed = @{pipeline().parameters.p_records},
    error_message = '@{pipeline().parameters.p_error_message}'
WHERE pipeline_name = '@{pipeline().parameters.p_pipeline_name}'
  AND status = 'STARTED';
